Description: Close critical security risks before scale/features.
Acceptance Criteria: No plaintext secrets in repo; no wildcard credentialed CORS; security tests pass.

Description: Replace YAML secrets with env/secret-provider bindings and fail-fast startup validation.
Acceptance Criteria: App boots only with injected secrets; no secrets committed.

Description: Remove wildcard origins and add explicit allowlists for dev/staging/prod.
Acceptance Criteria: Credentialed CORS works only for allowlisted origins; blocked-origin tests pass.

Summary: Cookie-based refresh token and CSRF protections
Description: Move refresh flow to httpOnly secure cookies and implement CSRF defense for cookie-auth endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Refresh flow works end-to-end; CSRF negative tests fail as expected.

Description: Enforce CSP HSTS X-Frame-Options and X-Content-Type-Options.
Acceptance Criteria: Headers present and validated by automated checks.

Description: Add secret scanning and dependency CVE gating to CI.
Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline fails on critical policy violations.

Description: Improve booking correctness concurrency control and data integrity.
Acceptance Criteria: Standardized domain errors; overlap/concurrency tests pass; key query performance improved.

Description: Validate date overlap at service and persistence layers.
Acceptance Criteria: Overlapping bookings are rejected with domain error.

Summary: Domain exception hierarchy and global handler
Description: Replace generic runtime exceptions with typed domain/application exceptions and unified API mapping.
Acceptance Criteria: Consistent error schema by category and code.

Description: Add @Version fields to booking/payment entities and conflict handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Concurrent write conflicts are detected and surfaced correctly.

Summary: Audit metadata and soft delete baseline
Description: Add created/updated/deleted metadata and soft-delete query behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: Logical delete behavior verified; audit fields auto-populate.

Description: Add missing and composite indexes for hot paths including email status landlord_id.
Acceptance Criteria: Measured query latency improves against baseline.

Description: Reduce architectural inconsistency memory leaks and runtime ambiguity.
Acceptance Criteria: Single websocket owner; no missing prod env keys; interceptor responsibilities clarified.

Description: Ensure required prod env keys apiUrl wsUrl and feature flags are present and validated.
Acceptance Criteria: Production build/runtime has no missing environment keys.

Description: Refactor ChatService to consume shared websocket service and prevent duplicate connections.
Acceptance Criteria: Only one websocket client/session per logged-in user.

Description: Adopt takeUntilDestroyed or equivalent in leak-prone components.
Acceptance Criteria: Memory regression checklist passes for key screens.

Description: Remove duplicate 401 handling and define single auth recovery owner.
Acceptance Criteria: 401 flow is deterministic and non-duplicative.

Description: Standardize on Ionic plus Tailwind and stop new Angular Material adoption.
Acceptance Criteria: PR checks/documentation enforce UI stack policy.

Description: Migrate scattered service state to NgRx Signal Store.
Acceptance Criteria: Core slices migrated and store patterns documented.

Description: Define slice boundaries naming selector/effect conventions and testing standards.
Acceptance Criteria: Architecture decision approved with example slice.

Description: Move auth/session/profile state to store.
Acceptance Criteria: Auth flows read/write state via store only.

Description: Migrate listing feed/filter/sort/search state to store.
Acceptance Criteria: Listings UX operates with store-backed state and caching rules.

Description: Migrate booking lifecycle state to store.
Acceptance Criteria: Booking views/actions are store-driven with predictable transitions.

Description: Migrate unread/message/notification state to store.
Acceptance Criteria: Unread counts and message state are centralized and consistent.

Description: Decouple synchronous workflows and enable reliable async processing.
Acceptance Criteria: Outbox enabled; retries and DLQ operational; key flows event-driven.

Description: Define versioned schemas for booking property message notification events.
Acceptance Criteria: Event contracts documented and versioned.

Description: Implement transactional outbox for reliable event publishing.
Acceptance Criteria: Events publish reliably without dual-write loss.

Summary: RabbitMQ topology with retry and DLQ
Description: Define exchanges queues retry policies and dead-letter routing.
Acceptance Criteria: Failed events route through retry and DLQ as configured.

Description: Move notification triggers to broker-driven consumers.
Acceptance Criteria: Notifications delivered via async consumers not tight service coupling.

Description: Build consumer to update OpenSearch from domain events.
Acceptance Criteria: Listing changes are reflected in search index reliably.

Description: Maintain performance under growth with cache search and resilience controls.
Acceptance Criteria: P95 latency targets met; resilience tests pass; cache KPIs visible.

Description: Implement key design TTL and invalidation for hot data paths.
Acceptance Criteria: Cache hit ratio and invalidation behavior meet targets.

Summary: Eliminate N+1 in property search paths
Description: Apply fetch/entity graph strategies on hotspot queries.
Acceptance Criteria: Profile shows no N+1 in prioritized search endpoints.

Description: Implement full-text geo and faceted search with relevance tuning.
Acceptance Criteria: Search parity and latency targets met for discovery use-cases.

Description: Add retry circuit-breaker bulkhead and rate-limit policies for critical endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Fault-injection tests verify graceful degradation.

Description: Launch monetization and owner trust/compliance workflows.
Acceptance Criteria: Sandbox E2E payment flow works; KYC gates enforced; webhook idempotency proven.

Description: Implement payment intent lifecycle and signed webhook handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Successful and failed payment paths validated with idempotent processing.

Description: Implement owner payout calculations transfers and accounting entries.
Acceptance Criteria: Ledger balances reconcile with transaction events.

Description: Implement KYC states verification process and policy gates.
Acceptance Criteria: Unverified owners are blocked from restricted actions.

Description: Implement support flow for disputes refunds and traceable outcomes.
Acceptance Criteria: Refund/dispute scenarios complete with audit trail.

Description: Launch vehicles rental vertical on shared marketplace primitives.
Acceptance Criteria: Vehicle listing to booking journey complete and feature-flagged by region.

Description: Add vehicle entities DTOs APIs and owner management flows.
Acceptance Criteria: Vehicle listings can be created updated published archived.

Description: Add vehicle-specific filters availability and ranking behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: Vehicle discovery supports required facets and sorting.

Description: Implement pickup/return deposit and policy rules for vehicle bookings.
Acceptance Criteria: Vehicle booking lifecycle passes E2E tests.

Description: Roll out vehicle vertical behind flags by region and cohort.
Acceptance Criteria: Controlled rollout and rollback validated.

Description: Operationalize multi-region routing DR and SLO-based operations.
Acceptance Criteria: Region failover drills pass; golden-signal dashboards and runbooks are active.

Summary: Route53 latency routing and health failover
Description: Configure latency-based routing with health checks and regional failover.
Acceptance Criteria: Traffic routes to nearest healthy region and fails over automatically.

Description: Run DR game-days to validate RPO/RTO and recovery playbooks.
Acceptance Criteria: RPO and RTO targets validated and documented.

Summary: Golden signal dashboards and alert rules
Description: Implement API DB cache queue and search dashboards with actionable alerts.
Acceptance Criteria: On-call can detect and triage top incidents from dashboards.

Description: Create incident response runbooks and ownership/escalation procedures.
Acceptance Criteria: Runbooks complete and linked from alerts.

Description: Define service SLOs alert thresholds and error-budget policy.
Acceptance Criteria: SLOs are published reviewed and tracked in recurring ops reviews.
